name: All-American Hot Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir the meat and onion in a large skillet over medium heat until the meat is brown.
2. Drain off excess fat, if necessary.
3. Stir in the undrained corn and the remaining ingredients (tomato sauce, olives, noodles, water, oregano, salt, pepper).
4. To cook in a skillet: Heat the mixture to boiling, then reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally until the noodles are tender (about 20 minutes). Serve hot.
5. To cook in the oven: Pour the mixture into an ungreased 2-quart casserole dish. Cover and bake at 375°F for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. Uncover and bake until the mixture thickens (about 15 minutes). Serve hot.
